Description: Calendar year of the spend record (e.g., 2025)
Calendar year and month of the spend record (e.g., 2025-01 for January 2025)
Standardized classification of the customer's business entity type (e.g., Hotel, Restaurant, Healthcare)
Standardized country of the customer location. This report is filtered to US customers only
Identifier for the market segment the customer belongs to (e.g.  Lodging | Healthcare)
Unique identifier for the top-level parent account / client. Used to group individual customer locations under a parent organization. Excludes Marriott International
Unique identifier for an individual customer location or account
Identifier for the brand the customer operates under (e.g.  a hotel brand within a parent hotel group)
Identifier for the parent brand that the customer brand rolls up to
Standardized city name of the customer's physical location
Standardized US state abbreviation of the customer's physical location
Standardized ZIP/postal code of the customer's physical location
Number of rooms at the customer's property. Primarily applicable to hospitality (hotel) customers; may be NULL for non-hospitality accounts
Indicates the customer's status on the ecommerce ordering platform (e.g.  Active / Inactive)
Unique identifier for the distributor warehouse that fulfilled the spend transactions
Grouping or classification that the distributor belongs to (e.g.  a national distributor group)
Unique identifier for the manufacturer of the purchased products
Alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the product category at the most granular level
Highest-level product category (e.g., Food, Beverage, Disposables, Chemicals and Cleaning, Room and Spa)
Second-level product category that falls within a Category Level 1 segment
Third-level product category that falls within a Category Level 2 family
Most granular product category classification. Falls within a Category Level 3 class
Total actual spend in USD for the current year (2025), aggregated across all matching dimension combinations in the result set (Randomized)
